MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JESUS DE RENDEROS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Jesus de Ronderos's unopposed motion to quash service of summons is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)
